name: Maria Lindqvist
notableTransitions: Transitioned from part-time retail (Espresso House) to a full-time SDR role in B2B SaaS (Brightloop).
Consistently overachieved quota (e.g., 142% of quota in Q3 2023) and expanded responsibilities (lead qualification, call reviews, pipeline maintenance).
Started self-directed side projects (Notion templates) and learned SQL/Airtable to build internal reporting tools, signaling interest in product/ops.
Collaborated with product team to relay onboarding feedback, contributing to roadmap discussions.
tensions: Title vs impact: SDR role demonstrates high impact but may not reflect seniority or leadership responsibilities.
Interest in product/ops growth vs staying in current IC path; seeking ownership opportunities without leaving the company yet.
Limited formal progression path within current role (no manager track yet) despite strong performance.
